title: WiVViW — Brand Intelligence OS — Visual & Competitive Compass

sections.title: PART I — The Visual Language of Branding
sections.summary: Defines branding as a repeatable signal system & outlines the Branding Signal Stack + Calm Tech/Glass Box doctrine.

sections.title: PART II — Competitive Lane & Archetypes
sections.summary: Maps competitor archetypes across brand platforms, naming generators, domain/handle utilities, agencies, & ops platforms.

sections.title: PART III — What Works & What Fails
sections.summary: Lists high-performing patterns to adopt & anti-patterns to avoid; centers trust-first, ritual flows, restraint, receipts.

sections.title: PART IV — What People Aren’t Doing
sections.summary: Identifies category whitespace: verified mode, receipts/versioning, real-world labs, compromise-cost, drift, governance UX.

sections.title: PART V — Differentiation & Moat
sections.summary: Defines the 5-pillar moat: Glass Box scoring, Evidence Vault, V4ULT timeline, ritual workflows, modular constellation.

sections.title: PART VI — Connective Tissue: One OS
sections.summary: Specifies universal skeleton (Brand Genome, receipts, exports) & adaptive skin (cinematic backdrops, palette, tone dial).

sections.title: PART VII — Engine Identities
sections.summary: Provides shared materials + distinct signatures for dRANb, brandL, 4IELD, 4TRESS, Evidence Vault, V4ULT, Health Gauge, Receipts, Twin Mode, expansions.

sections.title: PART VIII — Next Galaxy Moves
sections.summary: Blueprints personalization core + cinematic presentation engine; lists module-specific wow features & the target emotional outcome.

summary: A design, competitive, & differentiation compass for WiiVviW/BRANDLE OS: how to represent branding visually, map competitor archetypes, avoid common failures, claim whitespace, define a moat, and unify a modular engine network with consistent connective tissue plus distinct module identities.
